title: HrdaNick
description: Easily change your nickname with skin!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a10c7675807439c664b4b20bb395c82ea8fdcd5a.png)
A simple plugin for changing nicknames and skins at the same time! You need to have [SkinsRestorer](https://modrinth.com/plugin/skinsrestorer), [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) and [NickAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/nickapi-1-8-8-1-20-2-1-21.26013/) on your server. I also recommend to have [PAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi) for working placeholders. **For working advancements with nicks you need to have gamerule announceAdvancements to false** ## Need Hosting? Use PROMO CODE! ![neyhost promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c69bf42453db60ec47c6505de21e7e647f4b68a5_0.webp)(https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=HRDA) --- ## Features - **Skin & Nick Sync:** Changes your identity completely, including your skin. - **Random Nicknames:** Generate unique combinations from `random.yml` (prefixes, names, suffixes). - **Global Tab-Complete:** Nicked players appear correctly in tab-completion for all commands. - **Command Support:** Other plugins recognize nicked players (e.g., `/tp Nickname`). ## Commands - **/nick ** - set a new nickname with skin for you - **/nick random ** - set a random nickname and skin for a player or everyone - **/nick reset ** - resets nickname - **/nick set ** - set a new nickname with skin for specific player - **/nick list** - shows every listed nicked player (even offline) - **/nick reload** - reloads the configuration of plugin - **/nick resetall** - deletes all nicked players from files - **/nick whois ** - Shows the original nickname of nicked player ## Permissions - **hrdanick.use** - using /nick and /nick reset (Default: OP) - **hrdanick.admin** - using /nick set, random, list, reload, resetall, whois (Default: OP) ## Placeholders `Only in ver 2.8 or higher`
`For working placeholders → PlaceholdersAPI required` - **%hrdanick_nick%** - Shows player's nick - **%hrdanick_skin%** - Shows nick, from which skin used `Placeholder supports TAB by neznamy or DecentHolograms` --- ![bStats Servers](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Hrda-Nick.svg) --- ## Contact & API If you have any problems with plugin, just message me on discord server: https://dsc.gg/hrda-plugins
For API you can look on offical website: https://hrdaplugins.eu/wiki/hrdanick
Thanks for downloading!
